ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "fiscal_year_start" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal year */,
  "fiscal_year_end" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal year */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the company */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the company is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the company is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is located */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the report belongs to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report (quarter end) */,
  "sales" REAL /* Sales amount for the quarter */,
  "expenses" REAL /* Expenses amount for the quarter */,
  "other_income" REAL /* Other income amount for the quarter */,
  "depreciation" REAL /* Depreciation amount for the quarter */,
  "interest" REAL /* Interest amount for the quarter */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, submitted, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of financial category (e.g., income, expense, asset) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quarters" (
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quarter */,
  "quarter_name" TEXT /* Name of the quarter */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the quarter */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the quarter */,
  "quarter_year" INTEGER /* Year the quarter belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quarter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report the data belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial category */,
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quarter */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount for the financial category and quarter */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the financial data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES financial_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_quarter_id FOREIGN KEY ("quarter_id") REFERENCES quarters ("quarter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, auditor, executive) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_ratios" (
  "ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial ratio entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report the ratios belong to */,
  "gross_margin" REAL /* Gross margin for the quarter */,
  "operating_margin" REAL /* Operating margin for the quarter */,
  "net_profit_margin" REAL /* Net profit margin for the quarter */,
  "return_on_assets" REAL /* Return on assets for the quarter */,
  "return_on_equity" REAL /* Return on equity for the quarter */,
  "ratio_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the financial ratios */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_ratios_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "external_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data entry */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of external data (e.g., market trend, economic indicator) */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the external data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the external data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the external data */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the external data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("external_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report file */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the report file (e.g., PDF, XLSX) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_files_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial goal entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the goal belongs to */,
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quarter */,
  "sales_goal" REAL /* Sales goal for the quarter */,
  "expenses_goal" REAL /* Expenses goal for the quarter */,
  "profit_goal" REAL /* Profit goal for the quarter */,
  "goal_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the financial goals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_goals_quarter_id FOREIGN KEY ("quarter_id") REFERENCES quarters ("quarter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_goals_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial performance entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report the performance metrics belong to */,
  "sales_performance" TEXT /* Performance of sales (e.g., met, exceeded, missed) */,
  "expenses_performance" TEXT /* Performance of expenses (e.g., met, exceeded, missed) */,
  "profit_performance" TEXT /* Performance of profit (e.g., met, exceeded, missed) */,
  "performance_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the financial performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_performance_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report the task belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the task */,
  "task_date" TEXT /* Date the task was created */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "task_status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id")
)
